notes:
Map editor:Created a npc saying hi.
Database editor: Created a character, tested troop battle.
In-editor testing: Game can be played, but very low fps.

Sound issues? None, the app runs as intended.

Low fps possibly because of hardware rather than software.

No tweaks were needed to run the game, at least that required manual intervention.

This report will be updated in the future in a longer testing session.
title: RPG Maker VX Ace
